summary: Frontend mobile responsiveness testing completed for CRM app on 375x800 viewport. All 6 requested features tested and verified working: Budget page (2x2 grid, scrollable tabs), Facturation page (compact stats, inline filters), Tâches page (3-column stats, compact search, scrollable Kanban), AI Assistant page (Perplexity-style centered design with clickable suggestions), floating buttons (no overlap with 16px gap), and Things page auto-archive functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Budget page: grid-cols-2 for mobile stats cards, overflow-x-auto for tabs with 7 tabs visible - correctly implemented
Facturation page: grid-cols-2 gap-2 for compact stats, inline filters working - correctly implemented
Tâches page: grid-cols-3 for centered stats, h-8 compact search, overflow-x-auto Kanban container - correctly implemented
AI Assistant page: max-w-3xl centered container, 4 clickable suggestion buttons, textarea input at bottom - Perplexity-style correctly implemented
Floating buttons: AI button at bottom-24 (y:648-704), Quick Actions at bottom-6 (y:720-776), 16px gap - no overlap
Things page: toggleComplete function (line 61-74) sets archived=true when completed - auto-archive working
seed_data_creation: Created test task 'Test auto-archive task' to verify auto-archive functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile responsiveness features verified working on 375x800 viewport. Budget page has 2x2 cards and 7 scrollable tabs. Facturation page has compact stats in 2x2 grid with inline filters. Tasks page has 3-column centered stats, h-8 compact search, and scrollable Kanban. AI Assistant has Perplexity-style centered design with clickable suggestions that populate input. Floating buttons have 16px vertical gap (no overlap). Things page auto-archives completed tasks to Archives section.

budget_page_responsive.details: Stats cards in 2x2 grid (grid-cols-2). 7 tabs with overflow-x-auto container. Charts responsive. No horizontal body overflow.

facturation_page_responsive.details: Compact header with 'Facturation' title. Stats cards in 2x2 grid (grid-cols-2 gap-2). Inline filters (search + dropdown). No horizontal body overflow.

taches_page_responsive.details: 3-column stats grid (grid-cols-3) centered. Compact search input (h-8). Kanban container with overflow-x-auto for horizontal scroll. No horizontal body overflow.

ai_assistant_perplexity_style.details: Centered layout with max-w-3xl container. Minimalist interface with 'Que voulez-vous savoir?' heading. 4 clickable suggestion buttons that populate input field. Textarea input at bottom. Usage counter visible (199/200).

floating_buttons_no_overlap.details: AI Chat button at bottom-24 (y: 648-704, height: 56px). Quick Actions at bottom-6 (y: 720-776, height: 56px). Vertical gap of 16px - no overlap. Both positioned at right side.

things_page_auto_archive.details: Auto-archive on complete implemented in toggleComplete function (lines 61-74). When task is completed, archived is set to true. Toast shows 'Tâche terminée et archivée'. Archives section accessible via Filter dropdown.

mocked_features.note: Qonto OAuth2 integration not tested - credentials are invalid (invalid_client error as noted by main agent)
